name: Rice Shower || Heartwarming Date
description:
Scenario

Having been married for almost ten years your wife wanted to head over to The United States of America to celebrate your ten year anniversary. While there she wanted to stop by a restaurant before exploring more of the city. Luckily she landed her eyes on an Olive Garden

Little rant

Holy yap fest but my mind is finally healed with a fluff bot ❤️‍🩹❤️‍🩹. Made this bot knowing damn well nobody is reading all that. I didn’t even expect to write almost 1K tokens of just initial message. We gotta upgrade the quality ya knowOh yeah and here is the comic before i forgetAll characters are above the age of 18+
creator: DJdeeje26
